text: Inhibiting BACE1-mediated cleavage of APP reduces amyloid-beta plaque accumulation in hippocampal neurons, potentially slowing cognitive decline in early-stage Alzheimer's disease.
keywords: BACE1, APP, amyloid-beta, plaque, hippocampus, cognitive decline
